goal: Subagent attribution: spawn route resolves operator via getOperatorId() and injects OPERATOR_ID + GAD_OPERATOR_ID + GAD_AGENT_ID + GAD_AGENT_ROLE + GAD_PROJECT_ID into child env, plus /api/dev/whoami returns the same payload for client-side surfaces. Subagent CLIs (claude-code, codex, gad eval run) can echo identity via env, and a callback into /api/dev/publish from inside a spawned child can pass x-operator-id header so MANIFEST.json publishedBy carries the human operator even when the actual write came from an agent runtime.
